name: Chocolate Crinkle Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl.
2. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the brown sugar, butter (or shortening), and egg until light and fluffy.
4. Blend in the corn syrup.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and mix well until combined.
6. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
7. Dip half of each ball in water, then roll in granulated sugar.
8. Place the sugar-coated cookies on ungreased baking sheets.
9. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes.
10. Remove from the baking sheets immediately.
Makes: 3 1/2 dozen
